title: Process for Finding Subgame Perfect Equilibria in Finite Horizon Games
description: A step-by-step flowchart illustrating the backward induction process used to find Subgame Perfect Nash Equilibria (SPNE) in finite horizon sequential games.
elements: Locate the final decision nodes (last subgames)
Determine optimal actions at final nodes
Solve for optimal action given future play
relationships: Sequential process flow from Start to End
Each step leads to the next in reverse chronological order
The output of one step becomes the input for the previous step in the game tree
